# NOTICE
# Automated collection of content from news.6ray.com — including reading
# levels, quizzes, background reads, article structures, and Chinese summaries
# generated by the kidsnews team — is prohibited without express written
# permission. Original article content is sourced from licensed RSS feeds
# under fair-use; the derivative kid-readable forms are this team's work.
#
# Educational research / licensing / partnership inquiries:
#   contact: daedal1977@gmail.com
#
# We follow the spirit of robots.txt: bots that respect this file are
# treated as good citizens. Bots that ignore it are misbehaving and we
# reserve the right to block them at the edge / rate-limit / IP-deny.

# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# AI training crawlers — explicitly opt out
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# These crawlers identify themselves as AI-training agents. We don't want
# our content used to train models without consent. List grounded in:
# https://platform.openai.com/docs/gptbot,
# https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claudebot,
# https://commoncrawl.org/big-picture/frequently-asked-questions/

User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Disallow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Perplexity-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Disallow: /

User-agent: cohere-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: cohere-training-data-crawler
Disallow: /

User-agent: Diffbot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ImagesiftBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Disallow: /

User-agent: Meta-ExternalFetcher
Disallow: /

User-agent: FacebookBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Omgilibot
Disallow: /

User-agent: omgili
Disallow: /

User-agent: TimpiBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: YouBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Webzio-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: AwarioBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: AwarioRssBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: AwarioSmartBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DataForSeoBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: VelenPublicWebCrawler
Disallow: /

# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Everyone else — welcome, politely
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Search engines (Google / Bing / DuckDuckGo / Brave / Apple Search) and
# social-share previewers (Twitter / Facebook / LinkedIn / Slack / Discord)
# are explicitly desired here — we want kids and parents to find us, and
# share cards to render properly. They fall through to the wildcard rule.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 10

Sitemap: https://news.6ray.com/sitemap.xml
